entry.title: Unity Game Engine Series Part 16: Production & Industry Practices
entry.summary: Customize Settings Cookie Preferences Essential Cookies (Required) Necessary for the website to function properly. Analytics Cookies Help us understand how you interact with the website. Marketing Cookies Used to deliver relevant advertisements. Accept All Reject All Save Preferences Wasil Zafar

entry.title: Game Development Series Part 4: 2D Game Development
entry.summary: Master 2D game development - sprites, sprite sheets, 2D animation, tilemaps, parallax scrolling, and pixel-perfect collision detection.

entry.title: Game Development Series Part 5: 3D Game Development
entry.summary: Learn 3D game development fundamentals - 3D coordinates, meshes, materials, textures, lighting systems, cameras, and skeletal animation rigging.

entry.title: Game Development Series Part 10: Game AI Systems
entry.summary: Master game AI systems - pathfinding algorithms (A*, Dijkstra), finite state machines, behavior trees, decision trees, and NPC intelligence.

entry.title: Game Development Series Part 7: Audio & Sound Design
entry.summary: Master game audio and sound design - sound effects, background music, spatial audio, 3D sound positioning, FMOD, Wwise, and audio optimization.

entry.title: Game Development Series Part 2: Choosing a Game Engine
entry.summary: Compare Unity, Unreal Engine, Godot, and GameMaker. Learn what each game engine offers and how to choose the right one for your project.

entry.title: Game Development Series Part 9: Game Design Fundamentals
entry.summary: Learn game design fundamentals - player psychology, game feel, feedback loops, reward systems, difficulty curves, and creating engaging gameplay.

entry.title: Game Development Series Part 1: Introduction to Game Development
entry.summary: Learn game development fundamentals - understand what game dev really is, types of games, core components, and industry roles. Start your journey into creating games.

entry.title: Game Development Series Part 11: Multiplayer & Networking
entry.summary: Master multiplayer game development - client-server architecture, peer-to-peer, lag compensation, netcode, state synchronization, and matchmaking systems.

entry.title: Game Development Series Part 6: Physics & Collision Detection
entry.summary: Master game physics and collision detection - rigidbodies, colliders, raycasting, physics materials, joints, and physics simulation in game engines.

entry.title: Game Development Series Part 13: Building Your Portfolio
entry.summary: Build your game development portfolio - portfolio project ideas, game polish techniques, professional documentation, and career preparation.

entry.title: Game Development Series Part 12: Professional Workflow
entry.summary: Learn professional game development workflows - Git for games, version control, asset pipelines, team collaboration, and agile development practices.

entry.title: Game Development Series Part 3: Programming Basics for Games
entry.summary: Master game programming fundamentals - real-time loops, delta time, frame-based updates, and essential design patterns like State, Observer, and Component.

entry.title: Game Development Series Part 8: Building & Publishing Games
entry.summary: Learn game building and publishing - creating builds, optimization, QA testing, platform requirements, and publishing to Steam, itch.io, and app stores.

entry.title: Game Development Assessment
entry.summary: Test your mastery of the Game Development series. All questions, no time limit, detailed feedback after each answer. This assessment covers all topics from the Game Development series.

entry.title: Unity Game Engine Assessment
entry.summary: Test your mastery of the Unity Game Engine series. All questions, no time limit, detailed feedback after each answer. This assessment covers all topics from the Unity Game Engine series.
